programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Yuletide romance with Elizabeth Henstridge. Sparks light up the room when a historian creating an exhibition for the Plaza Hotel meets a handsome interior designer decking the iconic halls. (2019)
